approvalReceipt: Maintainer acceptance confirmed one reviewed approval and diff receipt in the installed app path.
coworkRequest: Maintainer acceptance confirmed one installed-app cowork turn.
gatekeeperPath: Unsigned ad-hoc app opened through the macOS manual Open path after installing from the downloaded DMG.
restartRecoveryProof: Maintainer acceptance confirmed the installed app relaunched and recovered after the initial run.
webSearchProof: Maintainer acceptance confirmed Web Search proof was visible in the installed app path.
workspaceDescription: Maintainer acceptance confirmed a local workspace was opened from the installed app.
